scripts.dev: npm run db:setup && concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @flowboard/api" "npm run dev -w @flowboard/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @flowboard/api && npm run build -w @flowboard/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @flowboard/api && npm run test -w @flowboard/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @flowboard/api && npm run typecheck -w @flowboard/web
